Embed an MCP app inside a live Shiny session

Source: R/host-shiny.R
mcp_embed.Rd

When called inside a Shiny server context, this helper auto-registers a live host instance and returns ready-to-render UI. Outside a live session, provide an id and pair the result with mcp_host_server().

Usage

mcp_embed(
  app,
  id = NULL,
  trigger = c("debounce", "change", "submit", "manual"),
  debounce_ms = 250,
  height = "auto"
)

Arguments

app

An McpApp object.

id

Optional DOM or module id.

trigger

Interaction mode: "debounce", "change", "submit", or "manual".

debounce_ms

Debounce interval in milliseconds.

height

Preferred initial height.
